Landing.hero: Action against the planet's growing disorder.
Landing.subhero: Earthropy coordinates global work on the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals. Forever free. Corporation-agnostic. Built for everyone, everywhere.
Landing.whatItIsP1: A neutral, public-good platform for coordinating work on the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals. Not a marketplace. Not a fundraising portal. A place to organize, discuss, and document the work itself — the groups, the posts, the moderation, the trust signals — without a corporate gatekeeper.
Landing.whatItIsP2: Free forever, in every locale we ship. Self-hostable. Source-available under AGPL-3.0-or-later. Built for NGOs, researchers, local communities, and anyone who would rather coordinate the work than coordinate the brand around it.
